title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel explores what the next training paradigm after scaling laws might look like, covering research bets from major labs. The discussion addresses key challenges including grindability, reinforcement learning from verification, and mechanisms for integrating learning signals back into model weights.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel examines what a training paradigm beyond scaling laws could look like, surveying research bets from major labs. The discussion covers grindability, reinforcement learning from verification, and the mechanisms for folding learning signals back into model weights. It connects these to test-time compute and reinforcement learning as candidate directions past pure scaling.
